disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: 38 Filipinos from hantavirus-hit MV Hondius back in PH - GMA Network
updates.body_en: 38 Filipinos from hantavirus-hit MV Hondius back in PH GMA Network
updates.summary_zh: 38名菲律宾人从汉坦病毒疫情邮轮MV Hondius返回菲律宾。

updates.title_en: 2 more cruise ship passengers leave Omaha quarantine after deadly hantavirus outbreak
updates.summary_zh: 2名邮轮乘客离开内布拉斯加州奥马哈隔离区。

updates.title_en: Almost all the passengers and crew of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak who had to quarantine in the Netherlands are now allowed to return home, the WHO chief said. I via ANC 24/7 Link of full story in the comment section.
updates.body_en: Almost all the passengers and crew of the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak who had to quarantine in the Netherlands are now allowed to return home, the WHO chief said. I via ANC 24/7 Link of full story in the comment section. facebook.com
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称荷兰邮轮疫情隔离人员几乎全部获准回家。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Scare Over? What We Know As Last Cruise Ship Passengers Leave Quarantine - News18
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Scare Over? What We Know As Last Cruise Ship Passengers Leave Quarantine News18
updates.summary_zh: 最后一批邮轮乘客结束隔离，汉坦病毒恐慌结束。

updates.title_en: Almost all passengers , crew from hantavirus ship out of quarantine
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮几乎所有乘客和船员结束隔离。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus update: 2 more leave National Quarantine Unit in Omaha - WOWT
updates.body_en: Hantavirus update: 2 more leave National Quarantine Unit in Omaha WOWT
updates.summary_zh: 内布拉斯加州国家隔离单位再有2人离开。

updates.title_en: Quarantine over for almost all hantavirus ship passengers and crew
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮几乎所有乘客和船员结束隔离。
